summary: TradeFlow Marketing website testing complete. All 3 main pages (Homepage, Pricing, Claim Territory) fully functional. Backend leads API working correctly for territory claim submissions. All navigation and footer links working.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: TradeFlow Marketing site fully tested. Homepage has hero section with 'Your phone should be ringing off the hook', stats (22×, 60s, 5×, <5%), trades section, 5-layer lead machine, and territory checker widget. Pricing page has 3 tiers (Starter, Growth, Market Leader) with ROI calculator. Claim Territory form submits to /api/leads/ and shows success state. All navigation works. Mobile responsive.
features_tested: Homepage loads with correct hero text 'Your phone should be ringing off the hook'
Homepage badge 'One contractor per market — guaranteed'
Homepage trades we serve section with trade pills
Homepage 5-layer lead machine section with steps 01-05
Homepage territory checker widget - trade selection and navigation to claim page
Pricing page 3 tiers (Starter $800-$1,200, Growth $1,500-$2,000, Market Leader $2,500-$3,500)
Pricing page 'Most popular' badge on Growth tier
Pricing page ROI calculator updates dynamically
Claim Territory form loads with all fields (firstname, lastname, business, phone, email, trade, city, team size)
Claim Territory form plan selection (Starter, Growth, Market Leader)
Claim Territory form submission works and stores lead in database
Claim Territory success state shows 'Territory request received' with next steps
Navigation between pages (Home, Pricing, Claim Territory)
Footer links (Privacy, Terms, Admin) all work
Mobile responsiveness - menu toggle, hero, stats visible
